steps.action: Grep for all createManualJournal(ManualJournalRequest) implementations in main source
steps.expected: Single authoritative implementation in AccountingFacade; overrides in AccountingService and AccountingCoreEngineCore are fallbacks only
steps.observed: 3 declarations: AccountingFacade.java:61 (authoritative), AccountingService.java:260 (delegates to facade), AccountingCoreEngineCore.java:364 (base fallback). AccountingService.createManualJournal always delegates to facade.createManualJournal when facade is available.

steps.expected: Single authoritative implementation in AccountingFacade; others are delegation chains only
steps.observed: Chain: Controller -> AccountingService -> AccountingFacade (authoritative). JournalEntryService delegates to AccountingIdempotencyService which delegates to AccountingFacade. All paths converge to one implementation in AccountingFacade.createManualJournalEntry.

sourceAnalysis.manualJournalEntryPath: Controller -> AccountingService -> AccountingFacade -> createStandardJournal (ONE path, with idempotency through AccountingIdempotencyService in the JournalEntryService route)
sourceAnalysis.duplicatePaths: NONE — all declarations either delegate to facade or are base fallbacks used only when facade is null (test-only scenario)
sourceAnalysis.externalBypass: Zero external callers — manual journal creation is fully contained in accounting module

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. VAL-JRNL-001: Manual journal creation routes through AccountingFacade with sourceModule=MANUAL, verified by 6 unit tests + source grep. VAL-JRNL-002: Audit trail records MANUAL_JOURNAL_CREATED with source=MANUAL, user attribution, and before/after state; filterable in listing — verified by 3 unit tests. VAL-CLEAN-002: Single code path for manual journals through AccountingFacade.createStandardJournal with no duplicate paths or external bypasses — verified by 9 unit tests + comprehensive source analysis.
